prompt: Create a dreamy high-detail anime fantasy portrait of an ethereal young adult woman floating in a dark cosmic void, surrounded by translucent glass objects. She has silvery platinum blonde very long wavy hair drifting weightlessly, pale porcelain skin, soft blue-lavender eyes, delicate features, and a calm melancholic expression. She wears a flowing pearl white satin camisole slip dress with thin straps and a sheer iridescent robe in pale mint, cyan, and lavender; the fabric should look weightless, glossy, and semi-transparent with shimmering caustic reflections. Pose her reclining diagonally from upper left to lower right, left hand raised holding one glowing crystal sphere, right arm resting on a large transparent rectangular prism. Surround her with exactly 12 visible glass spheres or bubbles: 1 large sphere in her left hand, 1 large partial sphere at lower left, 1 large sphere at lower right, 1 medium sphere near the top left, 1 medium sphere near the upper right, 1 medium sphere near the bottom center, 1 small sphere at her waist, 2 small spheres near the upper center, 2 small spheres on the right side, and 1 tiny sphere near the lower right edge. Also include exactly 5 large transparent crystal prisms: 1 tilted rectangular block at upper left, 1 faceted polyhedron behind her head on the right, 1 huge diagonal slab in the upper right corner, 1 rectangular block under her right arm, and 1 dark partial prism in the lower left corner. Use moonlit violet, icy blue, and opalescent cyan lighting, strong rim light, prismatic refractions, starry speckles inside the glass, soft glow, bokeh, and painterly ultra-polished rendering. Vertical 4:5 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra characters, elegant celestial atmosphere.
